name: stylish-care-app
description: AI-powered Customer Care Knowledge Base for Stylish International (STYLISH / Sinks Direct)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
